CustomField.formula: IF(ShippingCountry <> "US","NA", IF(CONTAINS("070, 071, 072, 073, 074, 075, 076, 078, 079, 103", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "X02", IF(CONTAINS("088, 089", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "X03", IF(CONTAINS("077, 085, 086, 087", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "X04", IF(CONTAINS("091, 092, 093, 094, 095, 096, 097, 098, 100, 101, 102, 104, 111, 112, 113, 114, 116", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "X06", IF(CONTAINS("110, 115, 117, 118, 119", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "X07", "NA"))))))
CustomField.label: GeoCodeXxx
